description: A faithful Codex pet of a soft pale-pink closed-eye cat with a tiny crown, pink bow, bell, and gold pocket watch, preserved as a calm elegant tea-time companion.

idle.notes: Calm seated idle with tiny breathing motion and a subtle tail sway.

walk.notes: True directional walk rows generated separately for reliable movement and drag-facing behavior.

curious.notes: Quiet curious loop with restrained head tilt and attentive posture.

happy.notes: Closed-eye satisfied smile with a tiny refined paw gesture.

sleep.notes: Curled noble nap with crown, bow, bell, and pocket watch still visible.

bow_tidy.notes: Extra etiquette loop: Pinka gently tidies her signature bow.

tail_sway.notes: Extra calm seated tail-sway loop stored in the spare atlas row.

yawn.notes: Soft sleepy yawn loop with no detached effects.

walk_right.notes: True right-facing strip, generated directly rather than mirrored.

walk_left.notes: True left-facing strip, generated directly rather than mirrored.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the true-facing walk rows.

tea_time.notes: Fixed atlas did not allow a dedicated table-and-cup prop row; bow_tidy preserves the same restrained afternoon-tea etiquette vibe.

read.notes: Fixed atlas did not allow a dedicated book prop row; curious review best preserves the quiet contemplative mood.

yarn_play.notes: Fixed atlas did not allow a dedicated yarn prop row; happy remains the closest soft playful energy.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk_left and walk_right are not swapped
crown, bow, bell, pocket watch, and tail stay directionally unified with the body
left drag never faces right and right drag never faces left

qaNotes.identityReadability: Small-size readability centers on the closed eyes, crown silhouette, pink bow with bell, and hanging gold pocket watch.
qaNotes.stripRules: All rows were generated sequentially and manually checked for exact frame count and one full-size cat per frame before atlas composition.
